svg.title: Cross-SIEM Query Translation Framework — Architecture and 20-Day Plan
svg.desc: Full system architecture showing Natural Language to multi-SIEM query pipeline, with evaluation layer, dataset construction, and publishable research contributions across a 20-day internship timeline.
